layout.disclaimer: Cura is an educational tool, not a substitute for a licensed clinician. If you have severe symptoms — high fever, chest pain, difficulty breathing, or anything that feels urgent — please seek medical care directly.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your care.
auth.signInFailed: Could not sign you in. Please try again.
auth.signInError: Something went wrong while signing in.
auth.registerError: Something went wrong while creating your account.
auth.fillAllFields: Please fill in name, email, and password.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

home.subtitle: Symptom triage, prescription reading, and AI-guided care — in your language.
home.featureMultilingualDesc: Use Cura in English, Hindi, or Kannada — including voice input.

symptoms.title: Symptom checker
symptoms.subtitle: Walk through four quick steps. We'll classify severity and suggest next steps.
symptoms.voiceHint: Tap the mic and describe your symptoms
symptoms.ageWeightRequired: Please enter your age and weight before continuing.
symptoms.pickSymptom: Please pick at least one symptom.

prescription.title: Prescription reader
prescription.subtitle: Upload a photo of your prescription and get plain-language explanations.
prescription.dropzone: Drag & drop a prescription image, or click to browse
prescription.chooseImage: Please choose a prescription image first.
prescription.imageOnly: Please choose an image file (JPG, PNG, or WebP).
prescription.serverDown: Can't reach the server. Make sure the backend is running.

history.title: Your history
history.subtitle: Past symptom checks and prescription analyses.
history.loadError: Couldn't load your history right now.

care.title: Care near me
care.subtitle: Find hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies nearby.
care.noHospitals: We couldn't find hospitals or clinics within range.
care.noPharmacies: We couldn't find pharmacies within range.
care.geoUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support geolocation. Using a default location.
care.geoDenied: Couldn't access your location. Showing results for a default city.

recommendations.title: Your recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Follow-up guidance based on your latest check.

assistant.title: Health assistant
assistant.subtitle: A live video session with an AI doctor avatar. Speak naturally — the assistant is grounded in a medical knowledge base.
assistant.greeting: Hi, I'm your health assistant. Ask me about symptoms, medicines, or care guidance.

analytics.title: Model analytics
analytics.subtitle: Live evaluation metrics from the symptom-triage ML pipeline
analytics.figuresDesc: High-resolution evaluation charts (300 DPI). Click to enlarge.
analytics.comparisonDesc: Full KPI suite across every candidate model
analytics.sotaDesc: Our model vs published baselines and additional ML algorithms
